activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identification via corporate group structure
General goods description with invoice reference
Manual review if quantity data missing in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Acoem AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'Acoem AB' including address and country Sweden after normalization. Legal form abbreviation and spacing differences accepted. Consignor name appears explicitly and identically. Country matches exactly (Sweden).

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'AU VIET TECHNICAL EQUIPMENT JSC' name and address in certificate and invoice match exactly after normalization. The consignee is found in the invoice's primary billing and delivery address fields. Country names normalized: 'Viet Nam' vs 'VIETNAM' agree.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description referencing the attached invoice explicitly with invoice number and date. The invoice description matches the referenced goods line 'Acoem WBT-400 T'. This fulfills the rule for general goods description with invoice reference, thus no separate detailed text match required.

quantity.motivation: Quantity given in certificate is gross weight 6,5 KG, which matches the invoice gross weight 6,5 kg exactly after normalization. The quantity in certificate box 7 matches the invoice total gross weight, and a single shipment quantity is also specified (1 ct.) consistent with rules.

origin.motivation: Origin countries 'European Community; Sweden' in certificate match explicitly with invoice field 'Origin: European Community; Sweden' after normalization with allowance for EU synonyms and country code equivalences.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match between certificate and invoice as per conservative rules. No mismatches or uncertainties detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan, och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
